stdout:
Reddit's Dev Platform CLI Tool

VERSION
  @devvit/cli/0.13.2 linux-x64 node-v24.14.0

USAGE
  $ devvit [COMMAND]

TOPICS
  create    Create a new icon set for your project
  list      List all apps that you have published
  products  Add a new product to your app
  settings  List settings for your app. These settings exist at the global
            app-scope and are available to all instances of your app.
  update    Update @devvit project dependencies to the currently installed CLI's
            version

COMMANDS
  help       Display help for devvit.
  init       Initialize a new app
  install    Install an app from the App Directory to a subreddit that you
             moderate. Specify the version you want to install, or default to
             @latest
  login      Log in to Devvit via reddit.com
  logout     Log out of Devvit via reddit.com
  logs       Streams logs for an installation within a specified subreddit
  metrics    Turn CLI metrics collection on or off
  new        Initialize a new app
  playtest   Installs your app to your test subreddit and starts a playtest
             session where a new version is installed whenever you save changes
             to your app code, and logs are continuously streamed
  publish    Creates a new app version, uploads it along with your source for
             review, and then files a publish request for you app.
  uninstall  Uninstall an app from the specified subreddit
  upload     Upload the app to the App Directory. Uploaded apps are only visible
             to you (the app owner) and can only be installed to a small test
             subreddit with less than 200 subscribers
  version    Display version information about the locally installed devvit CLI
  view       View details about an app version. Specify the version you want, or
             default to @latest
  whoami     Display the currently logged in reddit.com user
